title: Add within 100 using place value blocks
description: Practice adding numbers within 100 using place value blocks.
topic_path: Add within 100 using place value blocks

assessment_items.question_content:
**Add.**  
*Hint: Use the place value blocks to help solve $19 + 72$.*

$\Large{19 + 72 ={}}$[[☃ numeric-input 2]]

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c2180aeb614c140b10309441ae46744026a26227)
hints: Let's use the place value blocks to help us solve.

Let's put our tens and ones together.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/5280521ca8e3b6a86a0acbe141501c6ae2dc10f9)

 We have $8\text{ tens}$ and $11\text{ ones}$.

We can put our $11\text{ ones}$ together to make $1\text{ ten}$ and $1\text{ one}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a77555d2525d25efd874815d3b136105d0bde9ca)

In all, there are $9\text{ tens}$ and $1\text{ one}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/aa127670548050b717c76e5fd08d8f3290368db8)

$9\text{ tens} + 1\text{ one}= 91$
$\Large{\purpleD{19} + \maroonD{72} =\blueE{91}}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Add.**

hints: Let's use the place value blocks to help us solve.

We can put our $14\text{ ones}$ together to make $1\text{ ten}$ and $4\text{ ones}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e7acac6ba86582e915cc542fe664fe99499c9425)

$6\text{ tens} + 4\text{ ones}= 64$
$\Large{\purpleD{38} + \maroonD{26} =\blueE{64}}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Add.**  
*Hint: Use the place value blocks to help solve $54+ 29$.*

[[☃ numeric-input 2]] $\Large{=54+ 29}$

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/66907c3f0111e669f5b567cdfe7fbbe58cb9e66d)
hints: Let's use the place value blocks to help us solve.

Let's put our tens and ones together.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f858e2c317cb01cd5d5194105088728e707ff1d3)

 We have $7\text{ tens}$ and $13\text{ ones}$.

We can put our $13\text{ ones}$ together to make $1\text{ ten}$ and $3\text{ ones}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ba4ad5ab0c07329f14a846321efbb1896d25c1f8)

In all, there are $8\text{ tens}$ and $3\text{ ones}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/86a80b9d30edab2956b3126d8cf7964141d0428d)

$8\text{ tens} + 3\text{ ones}= 83$
$\Large{\blueE{83}=\purpleD{54} + \maroonD{29}}$

$\Large{\blueE{92} = \purpleD{88} + \maroonD{4}}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which equation can be represented from the place value blocks below?**

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/271df1978d1349df70815f050257f435a51f3694)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
The first set of blocks shows $\purpleD7$ tens and $\purpleD2$ ones so, our first addend is $\purpleD{72}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/292fb4cc3f7440cec74b57d98a7618adcc3c7583)

Our second set of blocks shows $\maroonD2$ tens and $\maroonD5$ ones so, our second addend is $\maroonD{25}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a5b9ffc08967099fc88535b0dcfbf658b0ece266)

Our sum shows $9$ tens and $7$ ones, or $97$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/bf3efd4bbd0fe516e8f36f80f53dcf0f45d28989)

This equation represents the place value blocks:

$\purpleD{72} + \maroonD{25} = 97$
